title: ligusticum jeholense
intro: Ligusticum jeholense, also known as Jehol Ligusticum or Chinese Lovage, is a type of plant that belongs to the Apiaceae family. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, anti-bacterial, and anti-fungal properties. The health benefits of Ligusticum jeholense include relieving fever, reducing pain, and improving digestion, as well as its potential to reduce blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Ligusticum jeholense is often prepared as a tea, capsule, or tincture, and it is also used in traditional Chinese cooking for its culinary and medicinal properties.
